title: Marvel Mjolnir Hammer Tool Set Mighty Thor 44 Piece Toolkit Ukonic Official MCU License
features: 44 Piece Tool Set in Portable ABS Tool Box Shaped and Styled in the Format of Mjolnir from the Marvel Cinematic Universe
Official Marvel Merchandise Manufactured by UKONICS under License from Disney and Marvel Studios
Comes with Hammer, Pliers, Wrench, Tape Measure, 12-in-1 Screwdriver, 24 Piece Sockets and more!
Would Make a Great Gift for All Those who are Worthy… to do DIY that is and Fans of the Franchise
Measures Around 38.5 cm by 14 cm by 22 cm. Suitable for Over 18's Only as Set Contains 4 Inch Safety Knife
description: Product Description A tool set for whomsoever is worthy! UKONIC Marvel Mighty Thor's Mjolnir 44 Piece Toolkit A Marvel-ous Tool Kit for any Wannabe Thor - 44 Pieces DIY Kit to DIY with - Comes in detailed ABS case - Includes Hammer, Wrenches, Stubby Screwdriver and Safety Knife - Ideal for those who are worthy - of DIY! Lets Take a Look at the Mjolnir 44 Piece Tool Set This tool set is made of premium quality materials meaning that its not just the look you're buying. Crafted by UKONIC this tool set has almost everything you'd every need for jobs round the home. Ideal for home DIY, or keeping with you in the car, caravan or to take camping with you! 1 2 3 4 5 6 So Whats Included? 1x 6" Pliers | 24x Sockets | 1x 2" Extension Bar | 1x 12 in 1 Stubby Ratchet Screwdriver | 6x Double Ended Screwdriver Bits | 1x 6" Wrench | 1 x 13oz Claw Hammer | 1x 4" Folded Knife | 1x Bit Extension Bar | 1x Level Vial | 1 x Quick Release Wrench Is Anything Else Included? Yes! - 5 Additional blades for the Safety Knife, a 3 Metre Tape Measure and 4 Piece Drive Brake Caliper Sockets. All this comes in the presentation rigid ABS plastic clip lidded Mjolnir tool box that folds up ready for carry and stowage. What Size are the screwdriver bits? 30 mm double ended bits which includes PZ2 x H5, PZ3 x H6, PZ1 x H4, PhiXSL4, Ph2 x SL5 and PH3 x SL6 What Size are the sockets? Metric Sockets - 4, 4.5, 5, 5.5, 6, 6.5, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14 | Imperial Sockets - 5/32", 3/16", 7/32",1/4", 9/32", 5/16", 11/32", 7/16", 1/2" More detail than a Marvel film! The Tesseract isn't the only pretty (tool) box! Molded in resistant ABS plastic that's designed to take a few knocks and bumps, the box has a high level if detail, with a brushed steel (or should that be brushed uru...) paint effect so not only does this tool kit perform but it also looks the part too! You don't have to be Thor to carry it! A Worthy tool kit for many situations Weighing just over 2.5 KG (5 lbs) this tool kit is sturdy enough to carried around with you, without being too heavy to carry. Making an ideal starter kit for a new to DIY novice or a great update to the seasoned enthusiast pro, this set is suitable for being used in a multitude of situations. Take it camping, keep it in the car or as your go-to tool kit for home - whatever you decide, this kit really is mighty!
